title: Lifesteal Utils
description: The largest unofficial utility mod for the Lifesteal Network (lifesteal.net)
body:
# Lifesteal Utils **Utilities, QoL and timers for the Lifesteal Network** _Not maintained by the Lifesteal Network!_ ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/lifestealutils?logo=modrinth&logoColor=%231bd96b&label=Downloads&labelColor=black&color=%231bd96b) ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-Fabric-beige?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,&label=Mod%20Loader&labelColor=black)
--- ## Highlighted features
View highlighted features ### Alliances **Add people as allies, have their nametags be highlighted in a different color!** ### Timers **Track custom enchant timers on a customizable HUD** ![A picture of the HUD editing interface, in which HUD elements can be moved around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb2d7a9a8fc101b6f80c997ed1e66ae67a7d00f.png) ### Customize Everything **Tailor the chat. Remove aspects you're not interested in.** ![A screenshot showcasing the customizability of team chat format](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef25cd53eb709e36a8ab8d50fd316c9957e2491.png) ![A message showcasing the customizability of DM messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b275026bef05e81435228cc434432a9c1df595e.png) ![An image showcasing further simplification options for the chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419c4a7865b2ef94dd8a9d5c5c2dd3e52582218f.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9d61524ca1ddfc01d0f9ebb878132f95521f559.png) ### Hub Auto-Join **Automatically transport from the hub to the server on join.** ### Rare Item Highlights **Highlight rare items on the ground.**
## Maintainer Hi! I, **Candycup**, am the core maintainer of LSU. If you think you remember me from somewhere, I was long-time staff, current Discord systems dev, and previously one of the managers of Lifesteal Network. Regardless of my involvement with the server, this mod is **not officially endorsed, supported, or maintained** by the Lifesteal Network team. It’s an independent effort to provide a cleaner gameplay experience so more people can enjoy the server to the extent that they want to. ## Special Thanks * **@actuallymilk** for supporting early development * **Jonnite** for code contributions
